name: Barbecue-Spiced Grilled Tenderloin Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the first six ingredients.
- This mixture can be prepared up to one week in advance and stored in an airtight container.
2. Prepare the barbecue grill for high heat.
3. Generously rub the spice mixture onto both sides of the steaks.
4. Grill the steaks until they reach the desired level of doneness, about 3 minutes per side for medium-rare.
5. Serve hot.
